meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding for No-Code Builders
content.seo_description: Learn how to build professional user onboarding flows without coding experience. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for freelancers.
content.answer_block: Stop struggling with complex code and start shipping. By leveraging Antigravity for UI scaffolding and Claude Code for logic implementation, you can build high-converting onboarding flows in minutes. This modular approach allows you to deliver professional, enterprise-grade user experiences for your clients without writing a single line of manual code.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the vision for a high-converting onboarding flow, but the barrier of 'no coding experience' keeps you tethered to slow, manual drag-and-drop tools that break under pressure. Your clients demand speed, scalability, and pixel-perfect design, yet traditional development feels like an impenetrable wall.

It is time to change the narrative. By shifting your workflow to AI-assisted development, you move from 'trying to code' to 'orchestrating software.' With tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you are no longer limited by your technical background; you are empowered by your architectural intent.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Before touching the CLI, outline the onboarding steps. Focus on the 'Aha!' moment. Identify exactly what the user needs to achieve to derive value immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a 3-step onboarding flow including user profile setup, preference selection, and a final feature tour modal.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate onboarding schema.json based on provided user journey requirements'

steps.title: Scaffold the Interface
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate UI components. This ensures a professional aesthetic without custom CSS headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React components for an onboarding wizard using Tailwind CSS, ensuring accessibility and mobile responsiveness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'initialize components/onboarding.tsx with generated schema'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Handle user progress across steps. We need to ensure that if a user refreshes, their progress is saved locally.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add state management to track active step index and user input data across the wizard components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply state management to onboarding flow for persistence'

steps.title: Integrate Backend Logic
steps.description: Connect the onboarding data to your database. This is where the magic happens and the user data is actually captured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a hook to POST onboarding data to a Supabase endpoint with basic error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'connect onboarding submission to backend API'

steps.title: Test and Refine Flow
steps.description: Execute a dry run. Check for edge cases where a user might skip a step or enter malformed data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the onboarding component to verify step progression and data validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'execute testing suite and fix identified edge case bugs'

pro_tips: Always use a 'skip' button; forced onboarding is the fastest way to lose a user's interest.
Implement local storage caching so users don't lose data if they accidentally refresh the browser.
Use micro-animations for transitions; they make the app feel significantly more premium to clients.
Keep your onboarding under four screens; every additional screen reduces conversion by roughly 15%.
Include a progress bar at the top; users are 40% more likely to finish if they see a visual representation of how close they are to completion.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, integrate a tracking tool like PostHog to see exactly where users drop off, then use Claude Code to iterate on those specific friction points.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to outpace every other freelancer in your niche by building faster and better. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
